allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {len\(d[""data""]\)}, stale: {d[""stale""]}, declared: {sum\(1 for c in d[""data""] if c[""status""]==""declared""\)}''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Parties:'', [\(p[''party_abbr''], p[''seats_won'']+p[''seats_leading'']\) for p in d[''data''][:5]]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)[:1000]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''stale:'', d[''stale''], ''| declared:'', d[''data''][''results_declared''], ''| leading:'', d[''data''][''leading_party'']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''stale:'', d[''stale''], ''| winner:'', d[''data''][''candidates''][0][''name'']\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''Top keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\) print\(''Areas count:'', len\(d.get\(''areas'', []\)\)\) if d.get\(''parties''\): print\(''Parties:'', len\(d[''parties'']\)\) if d.get\(''areas''\): a = d[''areas''][0] print\(''\\nFirst area keys:'', list\(a.keys\(\)\)\) print\(''Result keys:'', list\(a[''result''].keys\(\)\)\) cr = a[''result''].get\(''candidateResults'', [{}]\)[0] print\(''CandidateResult keys:'', list\(cr.keys\(\)\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); a=d[''areas''][0]; print\(''top:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''entry:'', list\(a.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''area:'', list\(a.get\(''area'',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:8]\); print\(''area id?'', a.get\(''area'',{}\).get\(''id'',''MISSING''\), ''areaId?'', a.get\(''area'',{}\).get\(''areaId'',''MISSING''\)\); print\(''result?'', type\(a.get\(''result''\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const a=j.areas[0]; console.log\(''entry keys:'',Object.keys\(a\)\); console.log\(''area keys:'',Object.keys\(a.area||{}\)\); console.log\(''area.id='',a.area?.id,''area.areaId='',a.area?.areaId\); console.log\(''result type:'',typeof a.result,''result keys:'',Object.keys\(a.result||{}\)\); }\)")
